import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if string.len(cur) > 0
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            tokens = __list_int_push(tokens, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(cur) > 0
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      tokens = __list_int_push(tokens, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  match tokens.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    a = v
  when None
    ()
  end
  match tokens.get(1)
  when Some(v)
    b = v
  when None
    ()
  end
  while b != 0
    let t = b
    b = a % b
    a = t
  end
  println("gcd=#{a}")
end
